(ERRONEOUSLY NAMED AND SUED AS AZUL WORKS HOLDING, INC. DBA AZUL WORKS, INC.) HEARING SET FOR NOV-08-2022 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-08-2022 IN 206, DEFENDANT AZUL WORKS HOLDING, INC. DBA AZULWORKS, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY CHRISTOPHER CAPALBO, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF CYPRESS INSURANCE COMPANY; AARON SCHULTZ, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT AZUL WORKS HOLDING INC. DBA AZULWORKS, INC. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PAY A $60 MOTION FILING FEE VIA E-FILING IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 02/06/23 IS CONTINUED TO 04/10/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. MR. SCHULTZ TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER, APPROVED AS TO FORM. COURT STATED THAT COUNSEL WILL FILE A MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE NO LATER THAN 11/14/22 (TO BE HEARD IN THE LAW & MOTION DEPT. 302). JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AZUL WORKS HOLDING, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594727 WITH CASE CGC-21-595127 IS GRANTED FOR ALL PURPOSES; THE FORMER SHALL BE THE LEAD CASE. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED . JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Dec-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT AZUL WORKS HOLDING, INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594727 WITH CASE CGC-21-595127.

Defendant's unopposed motion to consolidate case numbers CGC-21-595127 and CGC-21-594727 is granted for all purposes; the former shall be the lead case.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed
